top3.sql:
SELECT artist, format
FROM (
    SELECT artist, format, COUNT(*) AS card_count
    FROM cards c
    JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
    GROUP BY artist, format
) sub
WHERE artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM (
        SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS total_cards
        FROM cards
        GROUP BY artist
        ORDER BY total_cards ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)

WITH illustrator_counts AS (
  SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS card_count
  FROM cards
  WHERE artist IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY artist
),
min_illustrator AS (
  SELECT artist
  FROM illustrator_counts
  WHERE card_count = (SELECT MIN(card_count) FROM illustrator_counts)
)
SELECT DISTINCT l.format
FROM min_illustrator mi
JOIN cards c ON mi.artist = c.artist
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id;

SELECT artist, format
FROM (
    SELECT artist, format, COUNT(*) AS card_count
    FROM cards c
    JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
    GROUP BY artist, format
) sub
WHERE artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM (
        SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS total_cards
        FROM cards
        GROUP BY artist
        ORDER BY total_cards ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)

WITH illustrator_counts AS (
  SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS card_count
  FROM cards
  WHERE artist IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY artist
),
min_illustrator AS (
  SELECT artist
  FROM illustrator_counts
  WHERE card_count = (SELECT MIN(card_count) FROM illustrator_counts)
)
SELECT DISTINCT l.format
FROM min_illustrator mi
JOIN cards c ON mi.artist = c.artist
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id;

SELECT c.artist, l.format
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY artist
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT artist, format
FROM (
    SELECT artist, format, COUNT(*) AS card_count
    FROM cards c
    JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
    GROUP BY artist, format
) sub
WHERE artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM (
        SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS total_cards
        FROM cards
        GROUP BY artist
        ORDER BY total_cards ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)

WITH illustrator_counts AS (
  SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS card_count
  FROM cards
  WHERE artist IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY artist
),
min_illustrator AS (
  SELECT artist
  FROM illustrator_counts
  WHERE card_count = (SELECT MIN(card_count) FROM illustrator_counts)
)
SELECT DISTINCT l.format
FROM min_illustrator mi
JOIN cards c ON mi.artist = c.artist
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id;

SELECT c.artist, l.format
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY artist
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

final.sql:
SELECT artist, format
FROM (
    SELECT artist, format, COUNT(*) AS card_count
    FROM cards c
    JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
    GROUP BY artist, format
) sub
WHERE artist = (
    SELECT artist
    FROM (
        SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS total_cards
        FROM cards
        GROUP BY artist
        ORDER BY total_cards ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
